name: Potato-Corn Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Place onions, potatoes, carrots, celery, bay leaves, and vegetable oil in a large soup pot.
2. Add enough water or stock to cover the ingredients.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Stir in the frozen corn and chopped tomatoes (with their liquid). Simmer for another 10 minutes.
5. Stir in the coriander, savory, thyme, salt, and pepper. Continue simmering for another 10 minutes.
6. Remove about three-quarters of the potatoes with a slotted spoon and mash them well.
7. Return the mashed potatoes to the pot along with the remaining cup of stock. Stir well.
8. Simmer for an additional 5 minutes, or until ready to serve.
Adapted from Nava Atlas, "Vegetariana"
